result.stdout:
Version 1.0.0-alpha

Usage: RapidApi [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
  -v|--version  Show version information

Commands:
  config  Sets global configuration settings
  delete  Deletes a remote service
  deploy  Creates and deploys a new service remotely to Azure based on provided schema.
  list    Lists remotely deployed services
  run     Launches a mock service locally based on specified schema.
  update  Updates a remote service with a new schema.

Use "RapidApi [command] --help" for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Version 1.0.0-alpha

Usage: RapidApi [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
  -v|--version  Show version information

Commands:
  config  Sets global configuration settings
  delete  Deletes a remote service
  deploy  Creates and deploys a new service remotely to Azure based on provided schema.
  list    Lists remotely deployed services
  run     Launches a mock service locally based on specified schema.
  update  Updates a remote service with a new schema.

Use "RapidApi [command] --help" for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Usage: RapidApi config [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                      Show help information
  -t|--tenant <TENANT>              The default Azure tenant id to use for remote services
  -i|--subscription <SUBSCRIPTION>  The default Azure subscription to use for remote services

result.stdout:
Usage: RapidApi delete [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                        Show help information
  -a|--app <APP_NAME>                 The name of the app to delete.
  -t|--tenant <TENANTID>              The Azure tenant ID the app is deployed to
  -i|--subscription <SUBSCRIPTIONID>  The Azure subscription Id to use.
This is the extended help text for simple-command.

result.stdout:
Usage: RapidApi deploy [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                        Show help information
  -s|--schema <SCHEMA>                The path to the xml schema file.
  -a|--app <APPNAME>                  The unique name of the app to create.
  -t|--tenant <TENANTID>              The Azure tenant ID to deploy to
  -i|--subscription <SUBSCRIPTIONID>  The Azure subscription Id to use.
  -d|--seed                           Whether to seed the database with random data
